description_long: This is a compact Krups coffee machine with a modern, boxy design and a predominantly black and silver color scheme. The front panel features a large silver faceplate with a central dial, indicator lights, and the Krups logo, as well as two portafilter handles and a drip tray below. On the left side, a steam wand is visible, designed for frothing milk, while the right side shows the portafilter handle extending outward. The top and back of the machine are solid black with minimal detailing, emphasizing its clean, functional aesthetic. The machine appears to be constructed from a combination of metal and plastic, with some red accents on the handles and steam wand. Its size and design suggest it is suitable for countertop use in kitchens, cafes, or office break rooms.
description: A compact, modern Krups coffee machine with a silver front panel, black body, red-accented handles, and visible steam wand and portafilter.
description_view_0: Front view showing the silver control panel, two portafilter handles, drip tray, steam wand, and Krups logo.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the protruding portafilter handle and the side profile of the carafe area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, solid black back panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the portafilter handle and the drip tray area, with the steam wand partially visible.
attribute_brand_logo: The Krups logo is visible on the upper center of the front silver panel.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel features a central rotary dial with indicator lights and simple labeling, positioned above the portafilter handles.
